content: Wireless noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 30h battery life
Mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches and RGB backlight
Lightweight aluminum laptop stand adjustable for ergonomic posture
USB-C docking station with dual 4K HDMI, Ethernet, and 100W PD passthrough
Ergonomic vertical mouse with programmable buttons and adjustable DPI
4K ultra-wide curved monitor with USB-C hub and KVM support
Insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours
Portable espresso maker, hand-pumped, fits a single shot, travel friendly
Running shoes with breathable mesh upper and responsive foam midsole
Smartwatch with heart-rate sensor, GPS, and 7-day battery life
Leather messenger bag with padded laptop compartment fits 15-inch devices
Electric height-adjustable standing desk, 60x30 inches, memory presets
